title: BUbreakingHeadlines
description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from BUbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

items.title: U.S. beats Canada in thrilling and nail-biting Olympics gold medal final
items.description: Through a sudden death overtime goal, the U.S. men's hockey team is golden over Canada.

items.title: Maps show winter storm forecast bring snow, blizzard conditions to East Coast
items.description: Blizzard warnings were issued Saturday for New York City, New Jersey and coastal communities along the East Coast.

items.title: Man shot, killed by Secret Service outside of Mar-a-Lago, agency says
items.description: The man was shot following an "unauthorized entry" into the perimeter of President Donald Trump's Florida residence, the Secret Service said.

items.title: WATCH:  Conan O'Brien breaks silence on Reiner killings
items.description: Oscar host Conan O'Brien breaks his silence on the deaths of his friends Rob and Michelle Reiner, describing the disbelief he felt at the news.

items.title: Eileen Gu defends Olympic ski halfpipe title for her 6th career medal at Winter Games
items.description: Eileen Gu defended her Olympic ski halfpipe title to make it six medals in six events over her Winter Games career
